event: Born in Farnborough, Kent
Joined the Conservative Party
Started career as a commodities trader in the City of London
Left the Conservative Party over Maastricht Treaty
Founding member of UKIP (UK Independence Party)
Elected as MEP for South East England
Became UKIP Leader (first term)
Stepped down as UKIP leader
Survived plane crash on election day
Re-elected as UKIP leader
UKIP wins European elections with 27.5% of vote
Led Vote Leave campaign - Brexit referendum won
Resigned as UKIP leader after referendum victory
Founded Brexit Party
Brexit Party wins European elections
Brexit Party rebranded to Reform UK
Elected MP for Clacton - first Westminster seat
Became Leader of Reform UK
Reform UK leads national polls
Announced Reform UK frontbench team
